title: Auto-deploy: rebuild + restart dashboard server after merge to main

items.title: Create post-merge deploy script
items.description: New script at scripts/post-merge-deploy.sh that: (1) runs npm run build && npm link from repo root, (2) kills server processes on ports 3010/3011/3012, (3) detects runtime mode (bun dev vs node prod) and starts new server, (4) polls /api/health with 30s timeout. Accepts args: REPO_ROOT, ISSUE_ID, PROJECT_PATH, SOURCE_BRANCH. Logs to /tmp/panopticon-deploy.log.
acceptance: Script builds project and links globally
Script kills old server and starts new one in correct mode
Script waits for health check before exiting

items.title: Add deploy step 0 to postMergeLifecycle
items.description: Modify postMergeLifecycle() in src/lib/cloister/merge-agent.ts to: (1) write {issueId, projectPath, sourceBranch, timestamp} to ~/.panopticon/pending-post-merge.json, (2) spawn scripts/post-merge-deploy.sh as detached process, (3) return immediately. If spawn fails, log warning and fall through to existing lifecycle (best-effort). Must use execAsync/spawn (no execSync per CLAUDE.md rules).
acceptance: Pending file written before deploy script spawned
Deploy script spawned detached with unref()

items.title: Add pending lifecycle startup hook to server
items.description: Modify src/dashboard/server/main.ts to check for ~/.panopticon/pending-post-merge.json after server is ready. If found: read contents, delete file, validate timestamp (ignore if > 1 hour old), then schedule postMergeLifecycle(issueId, projectPath) after 3s delay. Also call notifyTldrDaemon if sourceBranch is present. Use fs/promises (no sync FS calls per CLAUDE.md rules).
acceptance: Pending file detected and processed on startup
Stale files (> 1h) logged and deleted without running lifecycle
postMergeLifecycle runs successfully in fresh process
TLDR daemon notified if sourceBranch present
Missing pending file is a silent no-op
